title: The Night the Lights Went Out in Georgia
original_title: The Night the Lights Went Out in Georgia
overview: An aspiring country singer and his feisty younger sister/manager struggle to reach their dreams of Nashville stardom-as long as she can keep her brother out of trouble with the ladies and the law-in this drama "inspired by," but not really connected to, the hit '70s ballad.
